mapper.select: SELECT r.reply_id, r.comment_id, r.user_id, COALESCE(r.user_nickname, u.nickname, u.username) AS user_nickname, r.content, r.like_count, r.dislike_count, r.parent_reply_id, r.create_time, COALESCE(l.like_type, 0) AS like_status FROM biz_card_reply r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN biz_comment_like l ON r.reply_id = l.reply_id AND l.user_id = #{userId} WHERE r.comment_id = #{commentId} AND r.status = '0' AND r.parent_reply_id IS NULL ORDER BY r.create_time ASC
